name: ChadLou's Coffee
tagline: Kailua's most serious roastery — artisan small-batch with cult-following seasonal lattes.
parking: Street parking on Hoolai or in the nearby municipal lot
talkStory: Chad is a certified Q Grader — the coffee world’s equivalent of a Master Sommelier — and ‘Lou’ is his wife and co-founder. They source beans directly from Hawaiian farms and roast everything in small batches in Kailua. Their seasonal lattes have a cult following; regulars track flavor drops on Instagram like sneaker releases. Buy a bag of their house roast — it’s some of the best roasted-in-Hawaii coffee you can take home.
